summary: Completed testing of Sitemap Generator feature. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend admin sitemap page working correctly with stats display, sitemap files list, and update button. Fixed missing AdminLayout wrapper in AdminSitemapPage.

minor.issue: Contains /caen/None URL - should filter out null CAEN codes
Slow response time (~22s) due to aggregation on 2.38M companies - expected for large dataset

backend_sitemap_index: Index contains 30 sub-sitemaps (3 static + 27 company pages)
backend_sitemap_judete: Contains Bucuresti and Cluj judet URLs
backend_sitemap_companies: Contains up to 45K URLs per page
backend_sitemap_status: Stats contains judete and caen_codes counts
frontend_admin_sitemap_page: Stats displayed: Total URL-uri (1,224,336), Firme active (1,213,714), Sub-sitemaps (30)
SEO submenu in admin sidebar with 'SEO Templates' and 'Generator Sitemap'

action_items: Fix /api/sitemap/caen.xml to filter out null CAEN codes (currently shows /caen/None)
Consider caching sitemap status aggregation to improve /api/sitemap/status response time (~22s currently)
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSitemapPage was missing AdminLayout wrapper - FIXED by testing agent
CAEN sitemap generation should filter out null/None CAEN codes in the aggregation pipeline
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing company data from MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sitemap Generator feature complete. Routes: /admin/seo/sitemap (admin page), /api/sitemap/index.xml (main sitemap index), /api/sitemap/static.xml, /api/sitemap/judete.xml, /api/sitemap/caen.xml, /api/sitemap/companies-{1-27}.xml. Admin endpoints /api/sitemap/status and /api/sitemap/generate require admin auth. The status API is slow (~22s) due to aggregations on 2.38M companies. Known bug: /caen/None appears in caen.xml sitemap. AdminSitemapPage was fixed to include AdminLayout wrapper.
